name: Calendar, Schedule
description: Google-Calendar-style agenda view. Lists upcoming events grouped by day, with date headers, all-day events at the top of each day, and per-feed colour dots. Pulls from the same calendar_core feeds as the other calendar_* widgets; pick which feeds to include per cell.

cell_options.name: feeds_filter
cell_options.label: Feed IDs (comma-separated; blank = all enabled)
cell_options.help: Restrict to specific feeds. Leave blank to include every enabled feed configured in calendar_core.

cell_options.name: show_dot_color
cell_options.label: Show per-feed colour dot
cell_options.help: Off makes the layout pure typography; useful on 1-bit panels.
